# twingate_sync_to_s3 (Data Source)

The datasource would allow users automate and get the oidc url used for the resources aws_iam_role, aws_iam_openid_connect_provider. For more information, see Twingate's [documentation](https://www.twingate.com/docs/syncing-data-to-s3).

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "twingate" {
  api_token = "1234567890abcdef"
  network   = "mynetwork"
}

data "twingate_sync_to_s3" "example" {}

output "oidc_url" {
  value = data.twingate_sync_to_s3.example.oidc_url
}

output "oidc_prefix" {
  value = data.twingate_sync_to_s3.example.oidc_prefix
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `type` (String) The type of the resource. One of: oidc or iam. Defaults to "oidc".

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `oidc_prefix` (String) The IAM Identity Provider prefix (return only if type "oidc"). Example: tenant.twingate.com/oidc/v2
- `oidc_url` (String) The IAM Identity Provider URL (return only if type "oidc"). Example: https://tenant.twingate.com/oidc/v2
